entry.title: New: BILL012(25) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO GAMBLING.

Requires cooperation between the Director of Planning and Permitting and Honolulu Chief of Police to ensure code enforcement of gambling-related public nuisances. Provides the DPP and the HPD with rulemaking authority.

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
